name: STERLING INFRASTRUCTURE, INC.
sic_description: Heavy Construction Other Than Bldg Const - Contractors
summary: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. (STRL) is a construction and infrastructure services company. It operates in segments serving residential home building markets and public/private infrastructure projects. Services include site development, underground utilities, and other construction-related work. The company bids on contracts across federal, state, and municipal markets and grows through acquisitions and organic expansion.
